purpose: Completeness-filtered spatial autocorrelation sensitivity for the three primary city networks.

scenarios.name: baseline_ge_1h
scenarios.description: All sensors; daily value kept when a sensor has at least one valid hourly record that day.

scenarios.name: daily_ge_12h
scenarios.description: All sensors; daily value kept only when a sensor has at least 12 valid hourly records that day.

scenarios.name: daily_ge_18h
scenarios.description: All sensors; daily value kept only when a sensor has at least 18 valid hourly records that day.

scenarios.name: record_uptime_ge_75pct
scenarios.description: Retain sensors with at least 75% valid hourly records; daily value kept with at least one valid hourly record.

scenarios.name: daily_ge_18h_record_uptime_ge_75pct
scenarios.description: Retain sensors with at least 75% valid hourly records and require at least 18 valid hourly records per retained sensor-day.

scenarios.name: drop_hourly_gap_gt_30d
scenarios.description: Retain sensors whose longest hourly missing run is no more than 30 days; daily value kept with at least one valid hourly record.

scenarios.name: daily_ge_50pct_gap_le_90d
scenarios.description: Retain sensors with valid daily means on at least 50% of days and longest daily missing run no more than 90 days.

scenarios.name: daily_ge_50pct_gap_le_25pct_period
scenarios.description: Retain sensors with valid daily means on at least 50% of days and longest daily missing run no more than 25% of the study period.

note: Highest-hourly uses the canonical aligned hourly matrices; daily valid-hour thresholds apply only to daily aggregation.
